name: dispatch
description: Plan before you fly — interview-driven specs. preflight gathers requirements into a single in-conversation plan; flightplan writes a multi-file blueprint to disk for later execution.

interface.shortDescription: Interview-driven planning: lightweight in-conversation specs and multi-file blueprints for sub-agents.
interface.longDescription: Two skills in one plugin. preflight is a lightweight interviewer that gathers requirements through systematic questioning and writes a single in-conversation plan to approve and execute. flightplan is the heavyweight sibling: it interviews thoroughly, then commits a complete blueprint to disk — PLAN.md plus a tasks/ tree with shared _context/ files and self-contained task files a different session or sub-agent can pick up and execute independently.
defaultPrompt: Interview me to spec this out before we build.
Help me think through this idea.
Fully spec this out and break it into task files.
Draft a PLAN.md and tasks for sub-agents.
